description: One-row aggregate of FAQ candidate counts per review status.
purpose: Feeds the metric strip on the FAQ review workbench. Deliberately returns a single row: metric-strip reads only the first row of its data source, so a GROUP BY shape would render as dashes.
fromSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE faq_status = 'draft') AS draft_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE faq_status = 'approved') AS approved_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE faq_status = 'published') AS published_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE faq_status = 'rejected') AS rejected_count FROM mt_faq_candidate WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId}
